hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.json|*.jsonc) pnpm dlx oxfmt "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true;; esac; }
hooks.statusMessage: oxfmt でフォーマット中...

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs) ./node_modules/.bin/oxlint "$f" >&2 || exit 2;; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */src/locales/*.json) pnpm -F @mi-deck/front validate-translations >&2 || exit 2;; esac; }
hooks.statusMessage: 翻訳キーの整合性チェック中...
